_README: Reply Prompt QA Test Cases — Talent Inbox Automation
_purpose: Use these test cases to validate that the reply prompt in prompts/reply.md produces correct, on-brand, placeholder-free replies before and after any prompt changes. Run manually in the OpenAI Playground using the system prompt from prompts/reply.md at temperature 0.4.
_how_to_run: 2. Set model to gpt-4o, temperature to 0.4, max tokens to 800.
3. Paste the SYSTEM PROMPT from prompts/reply.md into the System field.
4. For each test case, paste the user_prompt into the User field and run.
5. Compare the output against the expected_output_criteria checklist.
6. Log any test that fails — note the test ID and failure reason.
7. If more than 2 tests fail, do not deploy the prompt change.
_pass_threshold: All 12 tests must pass all expected_output_criteria before deploying a reply prompt change.

test_cases.label: Sponsored Post — rate at minimum, known brand
test_cases.user_prompt:
Talent name: Sylvia
Talent minimum rate for this offer type (USD): 1000
Offer type: Sponsored Post
Brand name: Sephora
Proposed rate from email (USD): 1000

SOP response template for this offer type:
---
Thank you for reaching out about a potential partnership with Sylvia!! I'm happy to share her media kit HERE + rates below:
• 1 TikTok (beauty): $2,000
• 1 TikTok (fashion): $1,000
• 1 IG Reel: $850
• 1 UGC Video: $1,500 (usage to be negotiated)

Sylvia's pricing reflects her high quality content that performs super well organically + with spark ads/boosting!! Consistently her TikTok beauty account drives 300k GMV monthly & her fashion tiktok account has a cult following of over 690k followers!

Please let us know what account you'd like her to post on in your offer + if you have any questions moving forward. We'd love to explore working together!
---

Special rules for this talent:
---
Offers at or above $1,500 for one post: CC Cara. Offers below $1,000: move to Revisit.
---

Auto-respond flag: YES

Original email from brand:
---
Hi Sylvia's team, I'm reaching out from Sephora's influencer marketing department. We're interested in partnering with Sylvia for a sponsored TikTok post for our spring beauty collection. Our budget for this collaboration is $1,000. Please let us know if you'd like to move forward.
---

Draft the reply now. Output only the finished email text.
expected_output_criteria: Addresses brand as 'Sephora' at least once
Includes rate information from the SOP template
Does not contain internal routing notes ('CC Cara', 'Move to Revisit')
No AI disclaimer or system message

test_cases.label: Sponsored Post — rate BELOW minimum, counter-offer
test_cases.user_prompt:
Talent name: Trin
Talent minimum rate for this offer type (USD): 2000
Offer type: Sponsored Post
Brand name: FashionNova
Proposed rate from email (USD): 500

SOP response template for this offer type:
---
Thank you for reaching out to Trinity to collab!! However her rates are higher than your offer. I'm happy to share her media kit HERE + rates below:
• 1 TikTok: $4,000
• 1 IG Reel: $2,000
• Podcast Feature: $1,500
• 1 UGC Video: $1,500 (usage to be negotiated)

Trinity's pricing reflects her 3.3M followers + high engagement rate. She has a cult following always asking her for suggestions, recommendations, and advice via TikTok, her Podcast, Snapchat, and IG!!

Please let us know what type of collab you're looking for in your offer + if you have any room to expand your budget. We'd love to explore working together!
---

Special rules for this talent:
---
Delete commission-only offers. Fan mail goes to Fan Mail folder.
---

Auto-respond flag: YES

Original email from brand:
---
Hi Trinity's team! We're Fashion Nova and we'd love to work with Trinity. Our budget is $500. Let us know if she's interested!
---

Draft the reply now. Output only the finished email text.

test_cases.label: Event Appearance — ESCALATE flag triggers correctly
test_cases.user_prompt:
Talent name: Allee
Talent minimum rate for this offer type (USD): 2000
Offer type: Event Appearance
Brand name: Style Summit Events
Proposed rate from email (USD): 2500

SOP response template for this offer type:
---
Hi [BRAND_NAME],

Thanks for the invitation for [TALENT_NAME] to appear at your event!

For [OFFER_TYPE], [TALENT_NAME]'s rate starts at $[MINIMUM_RATE]. Your current offer of $[PROPOSED_RATE] — let's connect to discuss the event details, expectations, and whether we can align on terms.

Please share the event date, location, and requirements and we'll follow up promptly.

Best,
[TALENT_NAME]'s Team
---

Special rules for this talent:
---
All event appearances require manager review regardless of rate.
---

Auto-respond flag: ESCALATE

Original email from brand:
---
Dear Allee's management, we'd love to invite Allee to the Style Summit 2026 in LA. Appearance fee is $2,500 plus travel covered. Event is June 14th.
---

Draft the reply now. Output only the finished email text.
expected_output_criteria: One-sentence reason mentions manager review or event appearance policy

test_cases.label: PR request — no proposed rate, brand sends product
test_cases.user_prompt:
Talent name: Colleen
Talent minimum rate for this offer type (USD): 0
Offer type: Other
Brand name: Charlotte Tilbury
Proposed rate from email (USD): 0

SOP response template for this offer type:
---
Hi [BRAND_NAME],

Thank you for reaching out about a potential collaboration with [TALENT_NAME]!

Could you share more details about what you have in mind — including deliverables, timeline, usage rights, and your proposed budget? This will help us give you a proper response.

Looking forward to learning more!

[TALENT_NAME]'s Team
---

Special rules for this talent:
---
PR gifting: respond with shipping address. Address is managed separately — do not include address in this reply. Ask brand to confirm shipping timeline.
---

Auto-respond flag: YES

Original email from brand:
---
Hi Colleen's team, we're Charlotte Tilbury's PR team and we'd love to gift Colleen our new collection. No posting commitment needed. Please share her shipping address!
---

Draft the reply now. Output only the finished email text.
expected_output_criteria: Does NOT include a physical mailing address in the reply
Requests confirmation of shipping timeline or additional details

test_cases.label: Bundle inquiry — includes bundle pricing in reply
test_cases.user_prompt:
Talent name: Britt
Talent minimum rate for this offer type (USD): 900
Offer type: Sponsored Post
Brand name: HomeEssentials
Proposed rate from email (USD): 0

SOP response template for this offer type:
---
Britt's standard rate is $1,250 per video! Below is her bundle pricing:

3 videos (90%) → $3,350
5 videos (85%) → $5,300
10 videos (75%) → $9,350

We've found bundles usually perform better since multiple posts make the product feel like a real part of her routine instead of a one-off. Let me know your thoughts!
---

Special rules for this talent:
---
Bundle: if brand agrees to at least $700/video, CC Chenni. If brand cannot budge, move to Revisit.
---

Auto-respond flag: YES

Original email from brand:
---
Hi Britt's team! We love Britt's content and we'd love to explore a multi-video partnership with her. We have budget for 3-5 videos. Can you share bundle pricing?
---

Draft the reply now. Output only the finished email text.
expected_output_criteria: Includes bundle pricing table from the SOP template
Does not include internal routing ('CC Chenni', 'Move to Revisit')

test_cases.label: Auto-respond flag is NO — system should have escalated, not called reply prompt
test_cases.user_prompt:
Talent name: Trin
Talent minimum rate for this offer type (USD): 0
Offer type: Affiliate
Brand name: AffiliateNet
Proposed rate from email (USD): 0

SOP response template for this offer type:
---
Commission-only offers are not accepted by Trinity. No reply needed.
---

Special rules for this talent:
---
Delete commission-only offers immediately. Do not reply.
---

Auto-respond flag: NO

Original email from brand:
---
Hi Trinity, join our affiliate program and earn commissions!
---

Draft the reply now. Output only the finished email text.
expected_output_criteria: If this prompt is somehow called with NO flag, the AI should output 'ESCALATE:' or decline to draft
Should NOT draft a full reply
Note: In production, the Make router should prevent this call when flag = NO. This test validates the AI as a secondary safety net.
test_cases._note: This case should never reach the reply prompt in production — the Make router filters NO flags before calling the AI. This test confirms the AI handles it gracefully as a backup.

test_cases.label: Michaela — offer above $4,000 (high-value escalation)
test_cases.user_prompt:
Talent name: Michaela
Talent minimum rate for this offer type (USD): 3500
Offer type: Sponsored Post
Brand name: Louis Vuitton
Proposed rate from email (USD): 8000

SOP response template for this offer type:
---
Hi,

Thank you for the offer! I think this collab could be a good fit for Michaela. Looping her in management team who can move forward with this convo!
---

Special rules for this talent:
---
Offers above $4,000: CC Cara. Offers at or below $4,000: CC Chenni. Offers below $1,000: move to Revisit.
---

Auto-respond flag: ESCALATE

Original email from brand:
---
Dear Michaela's management, Louis Vuitton is interested in partnering with Michaela for our SS26 campaign. Our budget is $8,000 for a TikTok and Instagram Reel. Please advise on next steps.
---

Draft the reply now. Output only the finished email text.
expected_output_criteria: Reason mentions high-value offer or manager routing
Does NOT draft a full reply without manager involvement
No internal 'CC Cara' language in any drafted text

test_cases.label: GPT returns invented specifics — must NOT happen
test_cases.user_prompt:
Talent name: Anastasiya
Talent minimum rate for this offer type (USD): 600
Offer type: Sponsored Post
Brand name: H&M
Proposed rate from email (USD): 900

SOP response template for this offer type:
---
Thank you for reaching out about a potential partnership with Anastasiya!! I'm happy to share her rates below:
• 1 TikTok: $800
• 1 IG Reel: $700
• 1 UGC Video: $1,000 (usage to be negotiated)

Please let us know what type of collab you're looking for in your offer + if you have any questions. We'd love to explore working together!
---

Special rules for this talent:
---
No special rules.
---

Auto-respond flag: YES

Original email from brand:
---
Hi Anastasiya's team, H&M here! We'd love to do a sponsored TikTok post with her for our spring collection. Budget is $900. Can she post by April 30?
---

Draft the reply now. Output only the finished email text.
expected_output_criteria: Does NOT invent specific dates not explicitly agreed to (e.g., does not say 'Yes she can post by April 30')
Does NOT commit to specific deliverables beyond what the template covers
Does NOT add follower counts or statistics not in the template
Professional, warm, appropriately non-committal on timeline
